tls.description: TLS material for the inter-node (Raft) channel. When set, all three of {caFile, certFile, keyFile} are required. Null / absent = plain TCP (legacy / single-core / VPN-protected multi-core).

caFile.description: CA cert used to verify peer certs (maps to rqlited -node-ca-cert)

keyFile.description: This node's private key (maps to rqlited -node-key)

verifyClient.description: Require mTLS on incoming Raft connections (maps to rqlited -node-verify-client)

verifyServerName.description: Expected SAN/CN when connecting to peers; null = use the hostname (maps to rqlited -node-verify-server-name)
